html:
AMD AMD (~$353.66) HIGH RISK

⇗ Top

Price: ~$353.66 | Entry Zone: $N/A – currently overbought

Technicals

  • The stock is in a strong uptrend, having rallied significantly since the last 'Buy' signal around $190-$200 in March.
  • The Relative Strength Index (RSI) (purple line) is currently in the overbought territory (~75-76) and is very close to its signal line (orange line, ~74-75), indicating extreme overbought conditions and potential for a bearish crossover or pullback.
  • The price has broken out of a previous consolidation range ($160-$180) from late September to early December and has not established new clear diagonal trendlines on the current steep rally.
  • The current price of ~$353.66 is significantly above all recent 'Buy' signals and is at a multi-month high.

News & Financials

  • No specific news or financial data is visible in the provided chart.

Assessment

  • Buy level: Not currently at a buy level due to overbought conditions and extended rally. A significant pullback or consolidation would be required for a more favorable entry.
  • Risk: High risk for new positions due to the extended rally and overbought RSI. Existing positions face risk of a pullback or correction from current levels.
  • Action: Given the current allocation of 3.6% (40.0 shares) and the highly overbought conditions indicated by the RSI, it is prudent to consider reducing risk. Recommend trimming the position by 25% (~10.0 shares) to lock in some profits and reduce exposure to a potential pullback.
action: Given the current allocation of 3.6% (40.0 shares) and the highly overbought conditions indicated by the RSI, it is prudent to consider reducing risk. Recommend trimming the position by 25% (~10.0 shares) to lock in some profits and reduce exposure to a potential pullback.

html:
AMZN Amazon.com, Inc. (~$262.04) HIGH RISK

⇗ Top

Price: ~$262.04 | Entry Zone: $230–245

Technicals

  • Price is currently testing the upper diagonal resistance trendline, indicating a potential breakout or rejection.
  • RSI is in overbought territory (above 70), suggesting the stock may be extended and due for a pullback.
  • The purple RSI line has crossed above the orange line, but the high absolute level of the RSI increases the risk of a reversal.
  • The stock has shown a strong upward trend, but is currently trading at the top of its established channel.

News & Financials

  • Amazon continues to benefit from strong AWS cloud growth and retail efficiency.
  • Market sentiment remains generally positive, but the stock is sensitive to broader tech sector volatility and macroeconomic interest rate expectations.

Assessment

  • Buy level: Wait for a pullback toward the 230-245 support area or a confirmed breakout above the current resistance trendline with high volume.
  • Risk: High, due to the stock being at the upper resistance trendline and the RSI indicating overbought conditions.
  • Action: Wait for a better entry point; do not initiate a position at the current resistance level. If a pullback occurs to the support zone, consider a starter position (1-2%, ~15-30 shares).
action: Wait for a better entry point; do not initiate a position at the current resistance level. If a pullback occurs to the support zone, consider a starter position (1-2%, ~15-30 shares).

html:
CEG Constellation Energy Corporation (~$310.93) NEAR ZONE

⇗ Top

Price: ~$310.93 | Entry Zone: $300–310

Technicals

  • Price is currently testing a recent resistance level near 310, showing a breakout attempt.
  • RSI shows the purple line crossing above the orange line, indicating positive momentum.
  • Recent 'Buy' signal dot on the chart supports a bullish short-term outlook.
  • The stock has recovered from the February lows and is establishing a higher-low structure.

News & Financials

  • Constellation Energy is a major player in nuclear power, benefiting from increased demand for carbon-free energy.
  • Strong tailwinds from the AI and data center boom driving demand for reliable, 24/7 baseload power.

Assessment

  • Buy level: Current price level of 310.93 is acceptable for a starter position, ideally looking for a retest of 300-305.
  • Risk: Potential for volatility if the broader market corrects; failure to hold above 300 would invalidate the current bullish setup.
  • Action: Initiate a starter position (1%, ~12.6 shares) given the recent momentum and buy signal, with a plan to add on a successful retest of support.
action: Initiate a starter position (1%, ~12.6 shares) given the recent momentum and buy signal, with a plan to add on a successful retest of support.

html:
GLD SPDR Gold Shares (GLD) (~$424.36) WAIT

⇗ Top

Price: ~$424.36 | Entry Zone: $400–415

Technicals

  • Price is currently consolidating after a recent pullback from highs near 500.
  • RSI is neutral at 44.89, showing no clear momentum in either direction.
  • Recent 'Buy' signal dot appeared, but the price is struggling to maintain upward momentum above the 420 level.
  • The purple/orange RSI lines are currently intertwined, indicating a lack of a strong trend signal.

News & Financials

  • Gold prices are sensitive to interest rate expectations and geopolitical stability.
  • GLD acts as a hedge; current market conditions show investors rotating between risk-on and risk-off assets.

Assessment

  • Buy level: Look for a retest of the 400-410 support area if the current consolidation fails.
  • Risk: Moderate; the asset is in a corrective phase following a significant rally, and further downside is possible if support levels break.
  • Action: Hold current position (25.0 shares). Do not add to the position until a clearer trend reversal or a stronger buy signal is confirmed by the RSI crossover.
action: Hold current position (25.0 shares). Do not add to the position until a clearer trend reversal or a stronger buy signal is confirmed by the RSI crossover.

html:
NVDA NVIDIA Corporation (~$200.52) HIGH RISK

⇗ Top

Price: ~$200.52 | Entry Zone: $165–175

Technicals

  • Price is currently extended above the long-term diagonal trendline support.
  • RSI is showing a bearish crossover with the purple line dipping below the orange line, indicating weakening momentum.
  • Recent price action shows a sharp rejection from recent highs, suggesting potential exhaustion.
  • The chart shows a series of 'Sell' signals following the recent rally.

News & Financials

  • NVDA remains a leader in AI infrastructure, but faces high valuation expectations.
  • Market sentiment is currently sensitive to broader tech sector volatility and interest rate outlooks.

Assessment

  • Buy level: Wait for a retest of the diagonal trendline near 170 or a bullish RSI crossover.
  • Risk: High; the stock is currently overextended and showing signs of a potential short-term pullback.
  • Action: Trim position by 25% (~6.2 shares) to lock in gains and reduce exposure given the bearish RSI crossover and recent sell signals.
action: Trim position by 25% (~6.2 shares) to lock in gains and reduce exposure given the bearish RSI crossover and recent sell signals.

html:
STX Seagate Technology Holdings plc (~$652.85) HIGH RISK

⇗ Top

Price: ~$652.85 | Entry Zone: $560–600

Technicals

  • Price is in a strong parabolic uptrend, significantly extended from the moving average trend structure.
  • RSI is at 82.74, indicating extreme overbought conditions.
  • The purple RSI line is currently above the orange line, but the steep angle suggests a potential for a sharp mean reversion.
  • The most recent candle shows a long upper wick, indicating selling pressure at current highs.

News & Financials

  • STX has benefited from strong demand in the data storage and AI infrastructure sector.
  • High valuation multiples relative to historical averages increase the risk of a pullback on any negative earnings or sector sentiment shift.

Assessment

  • Buy level: Wait for a pullback to the 560-600 range where the trendline support or previous consolidation levels may provide a better risk-to-reward entry.
  • Risk: High risk of a sharp correction due to the parabolic nature of the recent move and extreme overbought RSI levels.
  • Action: Trim position by 50% (~9.0 shares) to lock in gains, and hold the remaining 50% with a trailing stop to capture further upside while protecting against a reversal.
action: Trim position by 50% (~9.0 shares) to lock in gains, and hold the remaining 50% with a trailing stop to capture further upside while protecting against a reversal.

html:
TSLA Tesla, Inc. (~$380.31) WAIT

⇗ Top

Price: ~$380.31 | Entry Zone: $340–360

Technicals

  • Price is currently consolidating near the $380 level after a recent bounce from the $340 support area.
  • RSI is neutral at 50.63, showing no clear momentum direction.
  • The most recent 'Buy' signal occurred near the $340 support level, suggesting a potential floor.
  • The stock is trading below the recent peak near $400, indicating a lack of immediate bullish breakout momentum.

News & Financials

  • Tesla's stock performance remains highly sensitive to broader EV market demand and interest rate expectations.
  • Earnings reports (marked by 'E' on the chart) continue to be major volatility catalysts for the stock.

Assessment

  • Buy level: Look for a retest of the $340-$350 support zone or a clear breakout above $400 with high volume.
  • Risk: Moderate; the stock is in a broad sideways to slightly corrective trend, and a failure to hold the $340 support could lead to further downside.
  • Action: Hold current position (30.0 shares). The stock is currently in a neutral range; avoid adding until a clearer trend emerges or a retest of the $340 support level occurs.
action: Hold current position (30.0 shares). The stock is currently in a neutral range; avoid adding until a clearer trend emerges or a retest of the $340 support level occurs.

html:
VRT Vertiv Holdings Co (~$327.61) HIGH RISK

⇗ Top

Price: ~$327.61 | Entry Zone: $280–300

Technicals

  • Stock is currently in a strong, extended parabolic uptrend, trading well above recent consolidation levels.
  • RSI is hovering around 63.50, indicating strong momentum but approaching overbought territory.
  • The most recent 'Buy' signal occurred significantly lower; current price action is extended from the last trend-following entry points.
  • Price is currently at all-time highs, lacking immediate support levels for a high-probability entry.

News & Financials

  • VRT has benefited significantly from the AI data center infrastructure boom, driving massive valuation expansion.
  • High valuation multiples suggest the stock is priced for perfection, increasing vulnerability to any earnings misses or sector rotation.

Assessment

  • Buy level: Wait for a pullback to the 280-300 range or a consolidation period that allows the RSI to cool down.
  • Risk: High risk of a mean-reversion pullback due to the steep vertical ascent and extended distance from the moving averages.
  • Action: Maintain 0.0% allocation and wait for a pullback; do not chase the current breakout. If a correction occurs, consider a starter position (1-2%, ~12-24 shares) upon a successful retest of support.
action: Maintain 0.0% allocation and wait for a pullback; do not chase the current breakout. If a correction occurs, consider a starter position (1-2%, ~12-24 shares) upon a successful retest of support.
